prompt: Use @m to coordinate. CRITICAL: You MUST launch @a, @t, and @cr as real subagent handoffs using the Agent tool — not just mentions in text. The benchmark validates actual SubagentStart hooks. After @m analyzes the task, launch @a for architecture, then @t for testing, then @cr for review. Add weighted_average(values, weights) to calculator.py. Add one test. Run pytest -q. Finish with review status.
